item.title: void-rice
item.description:
Hello world. I’ve decided to upload my suckless tools to github, so here’s void-rice. It can be barely called a desktop environment, but it features most things you need after a fresh install of Void Linux.
I’ve been using this setup for the last months and I’m really pleased by the native multihead (monitor) support with xrandr. void-rice features a custom patched version of the dwm window manager with system tray support and sane keybindings, dmenu, slstatus for the statusbar info and a patched st terminal emulator.
